purpose: Composite stylesheet for the IDE debugger UI — covers FOUR sections: (1) Debug Toolbar (lines 1-205, .debug-toolbar with status dot + control buttons for play/pause/step over/step into/step out/restart/stop), (2) Problems Panel (lines 206-416, diagnostics for errors/warnings/info), (3) Debug Console Panel (lines 417-640, REPL-style output with expression evaluator), (4) Debug Panels (lines 641-1124, Variables/Call Stack/Breakpoints/Watch collapsible sections). Despite the four-in-one consolidation, sibling files (ide-debug-console.css, ide-debug-panels.css, ide-problems.css) ALSO define overlapping selectors — this file is loaded by IDEView.jsx alongside the others.
gotchas: OVERLAP: This file defines .problems-panel, .debug-console, and .debug-panels styles, but ide-problems.css, ide-debug-console.css, and ide-debug-panels.css ALSO define the same selectors. Last-loaded-wins. The current load order in main.jsx and IDEView.jsx determines which set wins. When fixing styles, search ALL FOUR files, not just one.
Hard-coded dark theme colors (#1e1e1e, #cccccc, #333) instead of CSS variables for some sections — palette is locked to VS Code-style dark, doesn't follow theme switcher.
1124 lines spans 4 conceptual sections; section banner comments are essential for navigation.
patterns: Section banner navigation: each section starts with /* ============ Title ============ */ banner.
Mix of theme variables and hard-coded VS Code dark palette.
